abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Eat Your Fill
abilities.text: After killing an enemy model with a (melee) action, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: Ramming Speed
abilities.text: This model's (melee) actions generated by the Charge action receive +1 Skl and any one suit to its final duel totals.

actions.name: Hip Check
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of a Piano marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Free Loot
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.
